infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: KULL 1 needs your location to verify catch submissions during tournaments.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: KULL 1 needs background location to track your position during active tournaments.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: KULL 1 needs camera access to photograph your catch.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: KULL 1 needs background location during active tournaments.

plugins.cameraPermission: KULL 1 needs camera access to photograph catches.
